title: Widdop Quicksilver Mug with Foil - New Daddy
description: Treat the superstar 'New Daddy' in your life to a the perfect cuppa companion with this luxury electro plated mug. From Quicksilver by CELEBRATIONS? - the perfect affordable luxury pick-up gift for any occasion. Featuring a gunmetal plated repeating pram pattern & title and a pastel grey handle, this is a wonderful functional new parent gift. EARTHENWARE - Strong, practical and easily shaped. The low firing temperature means earthenware is perfect for moulded designs. Not dishwasher or microwave suitable Quicksilver is the most successful collection of luxury greetings cards by the multi award-winning Wendy Jones Blackett. Our accompanying mug range is designed to sit alongside as the perfect luxury pick-up gift solution. Complete with a replenishable stand and optional handmade gift box. More than just a memory. CELEBRATIONS? is Widdop & Co's largest brand and a fundamental collection to any sentiment retailer.
